title: Growth chart review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Specifies age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference, growth plotting, feeding and medical history, developmental milestones, screening, immunization review, and caregiver counselling.
investigations.rationale: Supports age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference and growth plotting for child growth-chart review; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference, growth plotting, feeding and medical history, developmental milestones, screening, immunization review, and caregiver counselling.

investigations.text: Specifies weight and height measurement, clinical/developmental/social assessment, detailed feeding or eating history, observation, and assessment-directed investigations.
investigations.rationale: Supports weight, height, clinical, developmental and feeding assessment for child growth-chart review; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies weight and height measurement, clinical/developmental/social assessment, detailed feeding or eating history, observation, and assessment-directed investigations.

source.title: Faltering growth: recognition and management of faltering growth in children — Recommendations

referral.text: Defines growth monitoring and referral for underlying disorder, failure to respond, slow growth, rapid weight loss, severe undernutrition, safeguarding concern, or acute illness.
referral.rationale: Supports growth monitoring and referral context for child growth-chart review; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Defines growth monitoring and referral for underlying disorder, failure to respond, slow growth, rapid weight loss, severe undernutrition, safeguarding concern, or acute illness.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, measurements and dates, chart and reference, centiles, velocity, parental heights, feeding, development, interpretation and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for child growth-chart review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
